title: Orlando Bloom bought this Beverly Hills home for $7 million, redesigned it for 18 months, sold it for about the same price, and now it rents for $31,000 a month
summary: Orlando Bloom's former Beverly Hills residence is now available as a luxury rental. This property, which Bloom renovated extensively, is listed for thirty-one thousand dollars monthly. The four-bedroom house is situated in the prestigious Trousdale Estates neighborhood. It offers stunning city and ocean views, and remains fully furnished for its new occupants. Bloom previously sold this home after breaking even on his initial purchase price.
imageAlt: Orlando Bloom bought this Beverly Hills home for $7 million, redesigned it for 18 months, sold it for about the same price, and now it rents for $31,000 a month

fullArticle: The TOI Real Estate Desk is a focused team of seasoned journalists and market watchers dedicated to decoding the ever-evolving property landscape for The Times of India readers.
